MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-04-2019 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF MAGDALENA LANUZA'S MOTION TO APPROVE PAGA SETTLEMENT. PLAINTIFF MAGDALENA LANUZA'S MOTION "FOR AN ORDER APPROVING THE SETTLEMENT OF THE PAGA CLAIM ALLEGED AGAINST DEFENDANTS ACCENTCARE, INC. AND ACCENTCARE HOME HEALTH OF CALIFORNIA, INC'.IN ACCORDANCE WITH LABOR CODE 2699(L)" IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. I NOTE THAT, IN THE (OPERATIVE) FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT, MS. LANUZA SUED SOLELY "ON BEHALF OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA, AS A PRIVATE ATTORNEY GENERAL" AND PLED NO INDIVIDUAL CLAIMS. THUS, THE MOTION IS GRANTED AS EXPRESSLY REQUESTED IN THE NOTICE OF MOTION; THAT NOTICE DOES NOT MENTION MS. LANUZA'S INDIVIDUAL CLAIMS, OVER WHICH I APPEAR TO HAVE NO JURISDICTION.MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS VERBATIM WITH THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/RBU)
ORDER APPROVING PAGA SETTLEMENT
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: PAGA SETTLEMENT DETAILS SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-15-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Paga Settlement And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Jan-04-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MAGDALENA LANUZA's Motion To Approve Paga Settlement.

Plaintiff Magdalena Lanuza's motion "for an order approving the settlement of the PAGA claim alleged against Defendants AccentCare, Inc. and AccentCare Home Health of California, Inc'.in accordance with Labor Code 2699(l)" is GRANTED. No opposition was filed. I note that, in the (operative) first amended complaint, Ms. Lanuza sued solely "on behalf of the State of California, as a private attorney general" and pled no individual claims. Thus, the motion is granted as expressly requested in the notice of motion; that notice does not mention Ms. Lanuza's individual claims, over which I appear to have no jurisdiction.

Moving party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-22-2018 Continued To Mar-06-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
